description:
## Fixes

### Clipboard Enhancements

- Improved real-time refresh behavior within the Clipboard page by restoring items temporarily hidden when the stock live update path only keeps the most recent `5` timestamp groups.
- Fixed `Show order index` causing clipboard item content to become mismatched or appear to reorder while scrolling, due to `RecyclerView` view-holder reuse during live updates.
- Fixed `Show order index` labels not refreshing consistently for already-visible clipboard items after new clipboard entries were added.
- Improved clipboard live-update stability by restoring the full overridden visible list after stock adapter live-trim runs.

## Note
- Currently supports only the official Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a.


## 修正

### 剪貼簿增強

- 改善剪貼簿頁面內的即時刷新顯示，補齊官方 stock live update 僅保留最近 `5` 個 timestamp group 時造成的暫時性列表縮減問題。
- 修正啟用 `Show order index` 後，因 `RecyclerView` 的 `ViewHolder` 重用與即時更新交互影響，導致剪貼簿內容錯位、看起來像重新排序，或滑動時項目顯示異常的問題。
- 修正啟用 `Show order index` 後，當有新的剪貼內容加入時，畫面上原本已顯示的項目編號不會同步更新，必須滑動或重新進入頁面才會部分或全部刷新編號的問題。
- 改善剪貼簿即時更新穩定性，在官方執行即時修剪後，會重新補回完整清單，避免畫面暫時縮成不完整列表。

## 注意
- 目前只支援官方 Gboard 17.0.10.880768217-release-arm64-v8a
